message:
fix(tests): update E2E fixtures to Codex envelope format and add assertions

Improve E2E test reliability and coverage:

- Update make_codex_fixture() to use modern Codex envelope format
  (session_meta/event_msg/response_item types with payload wrappers)
  matching what src/connectors/codex.rs actually expects, instead of
  bare role/content JSONL that would fail to parse
- Add assertion that detail-open key did not produce "No active result
  to view" error, catching cases where no result was selected
- Add fixture regression check in perf test: verify first search query
  returns total_matches > 0 to catch fixture/connector mismatches early
- Include vestigial repro_noise_filter.rs (emptied test file)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
